beauty_over_compliance.name: Beauty Over Compliance
beauty_over_compliance.pattern: Push for beautiful designs, not just rule-following designs
beauty_over_compliance.problem: Reviews that only check compliance produce mediocre, soulless output

solution.approach: Ask 'does this make me feel something?' before checking rules. Encourage bold choices. Break design system when it produces better results.
solution.anti_pattern: Checklist-only review that approves anything meeting minimum standards

quality_rules: Is there a moment of delight?
